title: Saying Sorry 道歉
scene: Jack不小心弄坏了Lily的画，向她道歉。

lines.en: Lily, I have something to tell you.
What is it, Jack? You look serious.
lines.zh: 什么事，杰克？你看起来很严肃。

lines.en: I'm really sorry. I broke your picture by accident.
lines.zh: 真的很抱歉。我不小心弄坏了你的画。

lines.en: Oh no! That was my favorite drawing.
lines.zh: 哦不！那是我最喜欢的画。

lines.en: I know. I feel terrible. I didn't mean to do it.
lines.zh: 我知道。我感到很糟糕。我不是故意的。

lines.en: I knocked it off the desk when I was walking by.
lines.zh: 我路过的时候不小心把它碰掉到地上了。

lines.en: It's OK, Jack. I know you didn't do it on purpose.
lines.zh: 没关系，杰克。我知道你不是故意的。

lines.en: I'll draw you a new one. I promise.
lines.zh: 我会给你画一张新的。我保证。

lines.en: That's very kind of you. Thank you, Jack.
